label: Foundation
note: A new government inherits a country of 33 districts, 60 megawatts, and a shattered economy.

label: Stabilisation
note: Universal Primary Education begins; classrooms fill faster than they can be built.

label: Growth
note: Agricultural value chains — coffee foremost — start moving from subsistence toward trade.

label: Transformation
note: The Kampala–Entebbe Expressway and the Source of the Nile Bridge open; travel times across the country fall.

label: Acceleration
note: Karuma Hydropower Station comes online; installed generation capacity passes two gigawatts.

label: Next horizon
note: Forty years of foundation become the base for the next chapter: capacity.
